description_long: A muscular adult male stands confidently, dressed in a dramatic, sleeveless long coat with a high, spiked collar that gives a rugged, urban warrior vibe. His chest is bare, revealing a tattoo and a necklace, while his arms are wrapped in bandages and he wears fingerless gloves, with one glove appearing red and the other brown. He sports fitted pants that end just above the ankles, and his lower legs are also wrapped in bandages. On his feet are casual flip-flops, contrasting with the otherwise tough appearance. His hair is styled in a short, voluminous cut, and his facial expression is serious and focused. The overall look combines elements of street fashion and combat readiness, making him stand out in any urban environment.
description: A muscular man in a sleeveless, spiked-collar long coat, bandaged arms, and flip-flops, exuding a rugged urban warrior style. He is bare-chested with tattoos and a necklace, and his stance is confident and alert.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's bare chest, necklace, spiked collar, and bandaged arms, with both gloves and flip-flops visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the spiked collar, arm bandages, and the layered look of the coat, with the left glove and flip-flop in clear view.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the coat, the spiked collar from behind, and the back of his head and legs, with both arms and gloves visible.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the right arm's bandages and glove, the coat's side slit, and the profile of his hairstyle and facial features.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless long coat with spiked collar, fitted pants, bandaged arms, fingerless gloves, necklace
